channel.title: Petr Svihlik - blog
channel.description: Blog about all that matters to me - technology, life, leadership, and Developer Relations.

item.title: The Junior Developer Problem Is More Complicated Than You Think
item.description: A nuanced response to arguments about AI replacing junior developers, examining structural challenges and the profession's evolution.
item.content:encoded:
The Junior Developer Problem Is More Complicated Than You Think

A nuanced response to arguments about AI replacing junior developers, examining structural challenges and the profession's evolution.

Read the full article →

Published March 2026

  • Developers
  • Career
